name: minecraft-codex-skills
description: Five Minecraft 26.2 development skills for Codex and Claude Code, with built-in image-generation workflows on Codex.

interface.shortDescription: 5 reusable Minecraft 26.2 development skills with image-generation workflows on Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle minecraft-modding, minecraft-testing, minecraft-ci-release, minecraft-world-generation, and minecraft-imagegen in one installable package, with built-in image-generation workflows when running on Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Minecraft Codex Skills to scaffold a NeoForge 26.2 mod with data generation.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to generate pack art or concept textures for a Minecraft project.
